statements.sql: Connection Established
select * from `users` where `id` = 2 limit 1
select * from `settings` where `created_by` = 2

select `permissions`.*, `model_has_permissions`.`model_id` as `pivot_model_id`, `model_has_permissions`.`permission_id` as `pivot_permission_id`, `model_has_permissions`.`model_type` as `pivot_model_type` from `permissions` inner join `model_has_permissions` on `permissions`.`id` = `model_has_permissions`.`permission_id` where `model_has_permissions`.`model_id` = 2 and `model_has_permissions`.`model_type` = 'App\Models\User'

select `roles`.*, `model_has_roles`.`model_id` as `pivot_model_id`, `model_has_roles`.`role_id` as `pivot_role_id`, `model_has_roles`.`model_type` as `pivot_model_type` from `roles` inner join `model_has_roles` on `roles`.`id` = `model_has_roles`.`role_id` where `model_has_roles`.`model_id` in (2) and `model_has_roles`.`model_type` = 'App\Models\User'
select * from `settings` where `created_by` = 1
insert into settings (`value`, `name`,`created_by`) values ('2-logo-dark.png', 'company_logo_dark', 2) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `value` = VALUES(`value`)
select * from `settings` where `created_by` = 1
insert into settings (`value`, `name`,`created_by`) values ('2-logo-light.png', 'company_logo_light', 2) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `value` = VALUES(`value`)
select * from `settings` where `created_by` = 1
insert into settings (`value`, `name`,`created_by`) values ('2-favicon.png', 'company_favicon', 2) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `value` = VALUES(`value`)
select * from `settings` where `created_by` = 2
insert into settings (`value`, `name`,`created_by`) values ('GondalFulbe ERP', 'title_text', 2) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `value` = VALUES(`value`)
insert into settings (`value`, `name`,`created_by`) values ('GondalFulbe ERP', 'footer_text', 2) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `value` = VALUES(`value`)
insert into settings (`value`, `name`,`created_by`) values ('en', 'default_language', 2) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `value` = VALUES(`value`)
insert into settings (`value`, `name`,`created_by`) values ('theme-1', 'color', 2) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `value` = VALUES(`value`)
insert into settings (`value`, `name`,`created_by`) values ('false', 'color_flag', 2) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `value` = VALUES(`value`)
insert into settings (`value`, `name`,`created_by`) values ('on', 'cust_theme_bg', 2) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `value` = VALUES(`value`)
insert into settings (`value`, `name`,`created_by`) values ('off', 'SITE_RTL', 2) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `value` = VALUES(`value`)
insert into settings (`value`, `name`,`created_by`) values ('off', 'cust_darklayout', 2) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `value` = VALUES(`value`)
